qq8quad001a.preRemedialHint: Check properties in order: opposite sides parallel, then angle type.
qq8quad001a.quickCheck: List two properties first, then name the shape.
qq8quad001a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly mixing up core property-based classification. Revisit the property checklist section before the next question.
qq8quad001a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are taking longer on classification cues. Revisit the property checklist and decision sequence before continuing.

qq8quad002a.preRemedialHint: A square satisfies both rectangle and rhombus rules at the same time.
qq8quad002a.quickCheck: State one square property that also proves it is a rectangle.
qq8quad002a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing hierarchy relationships for square/rectangle/rhombus. Revisit the hierarchy section before the next question.
qq8quad002a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are spending more time on hierarchy classification. Revisit the subset map and then retry similar items.

qq8quad003a.preRemedialHint: All sides equal does not force right angles, so it can be rhombus instead of square.
qq8quad003a.quickCheck: Write one property that distinguishes rhombus from square.
qq8quad003a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly confusing closely related classes. Revisit the borderline-cases section before the next question.
qq8quad003a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are taking longer when classifying look-alike quadrilaterals. Revisit the borderline-case comparisons.

qq8quad004a.preRemedialHint: Start by counting parallel side pairs; one pair points to trapezium.
qq8quad004a.quickCheck: What is the minimum parallel-side condition for trapezium?
qq8quad004a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing the decision sequence for classifying by parallel-side count. Revisit that section before the next question.
qq8quad004a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are spending more time on parallel-side checks. Revisit the decision sequence and retry.

qq8quad005a.preRemedialHint: A kite is identified by two pairs of adjacent equal sides.
qq8quad005a.quickCheck: Say the key side-length rule of a kite in one sentence.
qq8quad005a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing adjacent-side-based classification. Revisit the decision sequence section before the next question.
qq8quad005a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are taking longer on side-pattern checks. Revisit the classification sequence before continuing.

qq8quad006a.preRemedialHint: Use the universal angle-sum rule first: A + B + C + D = 360 degrees.
qq8quad006a.quickCheck: Write A + B + C + D = 360 and solve one unknown at a time.
qq8quad006a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing angle-sum/property relations. Revisit the 360 degree angle-sum section before the next question.
qq8quad006a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are spending more time on angle-sum setup. Revisit the angle-sum visual section and then continue.

qq8quad007a.preRemedialHint: In a parallelogram, opposite angles are equal. Start from that property before calculating.
qq8quad007a.quickCheck: State the property first: opposite angles in a parallelogram are equal.
qq8quad007a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing opposite-angle properties in parallelograms. Revisit that section before the next question.
qq8quad007a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are taking longer on opposite-angle reasoning. Revisit the parallelogram-angle section in the visual lab.

qq8quad008a.preRemedialHint: Adjacent angles in a parallelogram are supplementary, so they add up to 180 degrees.
qq8quad008a.quickCheck: Set up the equation: given angle + adjacent angle = 180.
qq8quad008a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing adjacent-angle supplement rules. Revisit the parallelogram-angle section before the next question.
qq8quad008a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are spending more time on adjacent-angle setup. Revisit the same section with one worked example.

qq8quad009a.preRemedialHint: Use subset logic: a square satisfies both rectangle and rhombus properties.
qq8quad009a.quickCheck: Ask which statement is always true for every member of that class.
qq8quad009a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing quadrilateral class relationships. Revisit the hierarchy map section before the next question.
qq8quad009a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are taking longer on hierarchy reasoning. Revisit the subset section and then continue.

qq8quad010a.preRemedialHint: For rectangles, perimeter formula is P = 2(l + b). Rearrange before solving.
qq8quad010a.quickCheck: Substitute known values into P = 2(l + b), then isolate b.
qq8quad010a.interventionMessage: You are repeatedly missing rectangle perimeter-property setup. Revisit perimeter setup section before the next question.
qq8quad010a.behaviorInterventionMessage: You are spending more time on formula rearrangement. Revisit the perimeter setup section and solved example.
